description: Style Note In the past, looking good meant compromising on your comfort, but now, jockey briefs for women aims to change all that. jockey uses a variety of extra comfy and stretchy fabrics to create the most fashionable women's underwear styles. You can be sure that when you wear panties from Jockey, you're choosing all-day comfort. Now, looking good can be comfortable too! Product Details Bikini brief that is silky smooth with unique leg treatment Falls just below the natural waistline with no panty line promise The feminine bikini cut flatters your figure Fashionable ultra soft elastic that leaves no marks on your skin Material and Care Elastane stretch fabric Machine wash delicate at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Flat dry in shade
